headline: 2 Healthcare Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Shareholders who bet on the industry have been rewarded lately as healthcare stocks have returned 12.9% over the past six months, topping the S&P 500 by 6.8 percentage points.
